01

About

I got into data annotation through freelance platforms, and it's where I found real precision work I'm good at. Since then I've labeled and reviewed data for teams at Uber, Mindrift, Toloka, Softechub, and SuperAnnotate — across image classification, frame-by-frame video annotation, text annotation, audio transcription, translation, RLHF, and AI prompt evaluation.

I follow project guidelines closely and catch what others miss. Every label I deliver is checked against the brief before it's checked against the clock — I'd rather be precise than fast, though deadlines never slip. Clients get clear communication throughout, not just a finished file at the end.

High attention to detail Accuracy & consistency Strict guideline adherence Fast, reliable delivery

02

Services

img_cls

Image labeling & classification

Bounding boxes, tags, and category labels for computer vision and classification models.

vid_f2f

Video annotation, frame-to-frame

Consistent object tracking and labeling across video sequences, frame by frame.

text_ann

Text annotation

Entity tagging, sentiment labels, intent classification, and conversation annotation.

audio_tr

Audio transcription

Accurate speech-to-text transcription and audio event labeling.

translate

Translation

Language translation for multilingual datasets and localized annotation projects.

rlhf

RLHF & AI prompt evaluation

Response ranking, prompt evaluation, and human feedback labeling for LLM training.

ner_sent

Sentiment, NER & intent labelling

Sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and intent classification for NLP and chatbot training data.

03

Selected projects

PROJECT_ID · 001

Image Annotation

image annotation

I carried out image annotation by identifying and labeling objects with bounding boxes — drawing precise boxes around each item in a scene and tagging it by category, so the labeled data can train object-detection models.

CVAT LabelImg
quality: consistently met project quality standards turnaround: delivered on schedule client: SuperAnnotate
PROJECT_ID · 002

Video Annotation

video annotation

I worked on video annotation by labeling and tracking objects across multiple frames to capture movement and changes over time. This frame-to-frame process ensures consistency and accuracy for training video-based AI models.

Scale AI frame-to-frame tracking
quality: passed all client quality reviews turnaround: completed within project timeline client: Confidential
PROJECT_ID · 003

Text Annotation, Sentiment & Intent Labelling (NLP)

text / NLP

This involved labeling text to identify sentiment (positive, negative, neutral) and intent (e.g. complaint, request, inquiry), along with named entity recognition and speaker annotation — helping train NLP models used in chatbots and customer support systems to better understand human language.

Toloka Excel / Google Sheets
quality: high-quality labels delivered turnaround: on-time delivery, every batch client: Toloka
PROJECT_ID · 004

Audio Labeling & Speaker Diarization

audio transcription

Labeled multi-speaker audio for Uber's uLabel platform — segmenting speaker turns on the waveform, transcribing dialogue, and tagging language and speaker locale so the data is ready for speech-model training.

Uber uLabel multi-speaker segmentation
quality: met platform quality benchmarks turnaround: met platform deadlines consistently client: Uber (via Fuzu)
PROJECT_ID · 005

RLHF & Response Evaluation

RLHF

Evaluated and ranked paired AI-generated outputs side by side against quality guidelines, providing the human feedback signal used to fine-tune model behavior through reinforcement learning.

pairwise comparison model feedback
quality: consistent, guideline-aligned evaluations turnaround: submitted ahead of review cycles client: Mindrift
PROJECT_ID · 006

Object Detection & Semantic Segmentation

image annotation

Detected and labeled vehicles in dense highway traffic footage with bounding boxes, and performed pixel-precise polygon segmentation on complex subjects — outlining edges accurately even against busy backgrounds.

Pixlab polygon segmentation
quality: precise segmentation, client-approved turnaround: no missed deadlines client: Confidential
PROJECT_ID · 007

Data Structuring & Formatting

data QA

Converted unstructured information into a strict, exact output format per project guidelines — reformatting names, dates, and categories precisely as specified, with zero deviation from the required structure.

Softechub strict guideline compliance
quality: zero-deviation formatting compliance turnaround: delivered as scheduled client: Softechub
